# Society & Economics — The Year 2009

Social and economic events and developments from the year 2009.

<!-- BEGIN GENERATED: category-index — maintained by build-structure; do not edit by hand -->
| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| [American Recovery and Reinvestment Act](american-recovery-act-2009.md) | President Obama signed the $787 billion economic stimulus package on February 17, the largest fiscal intervention in US history to that point, aimed at reversing the deepest recession since the Great Depression. |
| [Uyghur unrest in Xinjiang](uyghur-unrest-xinjiang-2009.md) | Deadly ethnic riots broke out in Ürümqi on July 5, leaving at least 197 dead and over 1,700 injured, drawing international attention to tensions between the Han and Uyghur communities. |
| [General Motors Chapter 11 bankruptcy](general-motors-bankruptcy-2009.md) | General Motors filed for bankruptcy on June 1 in a government-backed restructuring — one of the largest US corporate bankruptcies and a defining episode of the Great Recession. |
| [Bernie Madoff sentenced](madoff-sentencing-2009.md) | Financier Bernie Madoff was sentenced to 150 years in prison on June 29 for the largest Ponzi scheme in history, the defining fraud of the Great Recession. |
| [Cash for Clunkers (Car Allowance Rebate System)](cash-for-clunkers-2009.md) | The $3 billion federal scrappage program ran July–August, scrapping roughly 677,000 vehicles to spur recession-era auto sales and improve fuel efficiency. |
<!-- END GENERATED: category-index -->
